name: Academy of Magical Arts
description:
HAHAH! NEW CHATBOT FOR YOU GUYS!

This time it’s not so much for gooning, but instead for story. Here’s the plot. (Btw it’s designed so your persona’s gotta be older than 18. 19 or 20 is good. Older is also fine. Just older than 18 is all.) [you can read the scenario for a bit more info walking in but I recommend just diving in. It’s best coming in blind as it’s kinda like its own Harry Potter-like world but maybe without wands? Who knows. Have fun. I found out Cherry Roses were made from this world so. Have fun. I sure am :)]

I tested this with Deepseek AI Model. Viewgrabber has more info on it. Otherwise, ye.

—

One day, you were living your life but some kind of purple fire was conjured from your hands (you describe why or how when relevant). So, you were sent to a secret island, Malencia, where its military-grade scientists agree to silently investigate you while you enter the prestigious Academy of Magical Arts. Your teachers and principal know of you and are here to help. Everyone says you’re powerless. You gotta keep this a secret while you figure out what the Malencia is, what the history is, what the purple flame is and what this unique world is.

—

Your Mission: Learn about the World of Magic. Its rules, functions, study in the school and survive. Learn the history and the uniqueness of Malencia. All the while a coming plot reigns in, and you may find yourself at the centre. Of a Legacy. What Legacy? Guess you gotta find out.
creator: VNgaming
